title: Review round 3: jmap-chat crate
notes:
R3-SEC0: No new correctness issues found. Reviewed: (1) control-char-only BearerAuth token correctly falls through to InvalidHeaderValue per documented contract — no gap; (2) Id/UTCDate null JSON deserialization correctly errors via String::deserialize rather than accepting null; (3) message_query double-filter (chat_id+has_mention=true) is valid — spec forbids neither, guard only enforces minimum filter presence; (4) SSE scan_from lookback of 3 bytes is exactly delimiter_len-1 for the longest delimiter (\r\n\r\n=4 bytes) — sufficient; (5) split_off extraction correct — buf[..pos] is frame content without delimiter, suffix is post-delimiter remainder; (6) CustomCaAuth struct literal usage: only CustomCaAuth::new() constructor used in tests — no external struct literal syntax found, no compile break.
R3 calibration: P0 findings: 0. P1 findings: 4 (subscribe_events missing connection timeout; Id::new/UTCDate::new wrong error variant; ClientError variants undocumented; message_get missing empty-ids guard). P2 findings: 1 (extract_response unnecessary args clone). P3/P4 findings: 0. Confidence: 5% chance of missed bug. Running out of real complaints: YES.
close_reason: All round-3 findings fixed; committed a7e37ca
